source_title: DOW-UAP-PR20, Unresolved UAP Report, Kuwait, May 2022
description_blurb:
The United States Central Command submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2022. The original reporter digitally altered the imagery by adding a red line encircling an area of interest before submitting it to AARO. An accompanying mission report, DoW-UAP-D12, described the UAP as moving from north to northeast. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.

Image Description: The image contains an encircled, elongated area of contrast in the top left quarter. The area of contrast increases in intensity along its length from top left to bottom right.

This image description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: DOW-UAP-PR20, Unresolved UAP Report, Kuwait, May 2022
summary: A UAP report submitted by USCENTCOM to AARO in 2022, including a digitally altered still image from a U.S. military system. The UAP was described as a small, bright, elongated object moving from north to northeast, which the operator was unable to positively identify.
bust_reasoning: The bust score of 60 reflects that while the report is labeled 'Unresolved UAP Report' by a military agency, the available data is limited to a single, grainy optical sensor feed showing a 'small, bright, elongated object' with simple linear movement. This places it in the 'genuinely uncertain' category where mundane explanations remain plausible without being explicitly ruled out by the document itself, but the 'unresolved' status prevents a higher bust score.
full_text:
# DOW-UAP-PR20, Unresolved UAP Report, Kuwait, May 2022 - Page 1

CLEARED
For Open Publication
Mar 10, 2026
Department of Defense
OFFICE OF PREPUBLICATION AND SECURITY REVIEW

[redacted]

Recommendation by MG Richard A. Harrison
USCENTCOM Chief of Staff
Recommended on: 8 Oct 25

[Image: A grainy, black-and-white sensor feed showing a landscape. A red circle is drawn around a small, bright, elongated object in the upper-left quadrant. There are four corner brackets (L-shaped) and a central crosshair. The letter "N" is visible near the bottom center.]

USCENTCOM MDR 25-0094 thru MDR 25-0099 / JS-250710-TM8S
USCENTCOM Recommendation to AARO
10/17/25 001
cover_up_reasoning: The document explicitly states it was 'CLEARED For Open Publication' by the Department of Defense, indicating a process of declassification and release. The only instance of redaction is a single '[redacted]' block, which is routine and minimal, likely pertaining to a name or minor administrative detail, and does not suggest substantial or extreme concealment.
title_zh: DOW-UAP-PR20，未解决的UAP报告，科威特，2022年5月
summary_zh: 美国中央司令部于2022年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份UAP报告，其中包含一张来自美国军事系统的经过数字修改的静态图像。该UAP被描述为一个小型、明亮、细长的物体，从北部向东北方向移动，操作员未能明确识别该物体。
reported_behavior_zh: 从北部向东北方向移动
bust_reasoning_zh: 驳斥评分为60分，表明尽管该报告被军事机构标记为“未解决的UAP报告”，但可用数据仅限于一份单一、颗粒状的光学传感器影像，显示一个“小型、明亮、细长的物体”具有简单的线性移动。这将其归入“确实不确定”的类别，在此类别中，世俗解释仍然合理，且未被文件本身明确排除，但“未解决”的状态阻止了更高的驳斥评分。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件明确指出其已由美国国防部“批准公开发布”，表明其经过解密和发布程序。唯一一处编辑实例是一个单独的“[已编辑]”区块，这属于常规且极少见的做法，可能涉及姓名或次要行政细节，且不暗示存在实质性或极端的隐瞒。
claims: UAP reported by USCENTCOM to AARO
Still image from U.S. military system
Image digitally altered with a red line
Object described as small, bright, elongated
Object moved from north to northeast
claims_zh: 美国中央司令部向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）报告的UAP
来自美国军事系统的静态图像
图像经数字修改并带有红线
物体被描述为小型、明亮、细长
物体从北部向东北方向移动
bust_explanations: Distant aircraft or military drone operating in the region, appearing small and bright due to distance and lighting conditions.
Rocket body or space debris reflecting sunlight, which can appear elongated and bright, moving linearly.
High-altitude balloon (weather or surveillance) that, depending on its shape and angle to the observer, could appear small, bright, and elongated.
bust_explanations_zh: 在该区域运行的远距离飞机或军用无人机，因距离和光照条件而显得小型且明亮。
反射阳光的火箭残骸或空间碎片，可能呈现细长、明亮的外观，并作线性移动。
高空（气象或侦察）气球，根据其形状和相对于观察者的角度，可能显得小型、明亮且细长。
cover_up_indicators_zh: 单一的“[已编辑]”区块实例
